smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy later. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
